Intelligent Accounting.
London Clarity.

Audit, assurance, tax, and bookkeeping for London's ambitious businesses — where grey matter meets financial accuracy.

Call 020 1234 5678

We Don't Just Count Numbers

We interpret them.

Based in the heart of London, we serve entrepreneurs, SMEs, and established firms with a blend of technical rigour and commercial instinct. Our name reflects our philosophy: grey matter — intelligence, problem-solving, and strategic thinking applied to your finances.

We are regulated by UK professional bodies and offer services across Greater London — from Soho startups to City firms.

500+ Clients
15+ Years Experience
£50M+ Managed Annually
SC
JV
ER

Our Core Services

Complete financial solutions tailored to your needs

Audit & Assurance

Independent, UK-compliant audits that build stakeholder confidence. We follow FRS 102/105 and ISA (UK) standards. Perfect for companies requiring statutory audits or lender assurance.

Learn more

Tax Reporting

Full UK tax compliance — Corporation Tax, Self Assessment, VAT, and ERS. We file directly to HMRC and help you plan, not just comply.

Learn more

Bookkeeping

Daily, weekly, or monthly transaction management via Xero, QuickBooks, or FreeAgent. Clean books = real-time decisions.

Learn more

Management Accounts

Not just for year-end. Get P&L, balance sheets, and KPIs every month to steer your London business with confidence.

Learn more

VAT & Making Tax Digital

Making Tax Digital ready. VAT returns, partial exemption, and scheme advice (flat rate, cash accounting, annual).

Learn more

Company Secretarial

Confirmation statements, share filings, and Companies House compliance — handled proactively.

Learn more

Industries We Serve

London's diverse economy. From Soho to the City.

Property & Construction

Service charges, CIS, development JVs

Professional Services

Law firms, consultants, architects

Creative & Media

Advertising, production, design

Retail & Hospitality

Multi-location, EPOS integrated

Tech & Startups

SEIS/EIS, R&D tax credits, investor-ready

"They actually understand how a creative agency in Shoreditch operates — not just the ledger."

— Client testimonial

Why Greymatter Accountancy

Three reasons we're different

Brain Over Boilerplate

We don't use templates. We apply analytical thinking to your unique structure. Every business is different, and your accounting should reflect that.

London Speed + Precision

Same-day responses during working hours. Weekend catch-ups for busy owners. We understand London's pace and work with you, not against you.

Fully UK Compliant

Registered with ACCA/ICAEW, insured, and up to date with HMRC's latest rules. Compliance isn't optional — it's the foundation.

How It Works

Three simple steps to better accounting

1

Diagnosis Call (15 min)

Free, no obligation. We review your current accounting setup and identify opportunities.

2

Tailored Scope & Fee

Fixed monthly or project pricing. No hidden charges. Transparent from day one.

3

Onboarding & Handover

We connect to your data source or set up books from scratch. Seamless transition.

Transparent Pricing

No surprises. No lock-in contracts.

Meet the Team

Experienced professionals who care about your success

Sarah Okonkwo

Managing Director, FCCA

15+ years in London practice. Specializes in audit, financial reporting, and strategic planning for growth-stage businesses.
